parameters.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM ingested_content WHERE status = 'pending';

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'No pending items to publish', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id, source_name, source_url, raw_title, raw_body, raw_image_url, language FROM ingested_content WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY ingested_at ASC LIMIT 5;
UPDATE ingested_content SET status = 'processing' WHERE id = $1 AND status = 'pending' RETURNING id, source_name, source_url, raw_title, raw_body, raw_image_url, language;
UPDATE ingested_content SET status = 'rejected', reject_reason = $2 WHERE id = $1;
INSERT INTO social_posts (ingested_id, platform, caption, status, error_message) VALUES ($1, 'facebook', $2, 'failed', $3);
UPDATE ingested_content SET status = 'published' WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO social_posts (ingested_id, platform, caption, image_url, image_source, image_moderation_status, status, published_at, platform_post_id, error_message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW(), $8, $9);

parameters.jsCode:
const allItems = $input.all();
return [{ json: { published_count: allItems.length, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE social_rotation SET posts_today = posts_today + 1, last_posted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE platform IN ('facebook', 'twitter') AND category NOT LIKE 'offset_%';
